Software Engineer — Backend

Acme Corp is looking for a backend software engineer to join our payments team.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build scalable REST APIs in Python
- Work with PostgreSQL and Redis for data storage and caching
- Collaborate with frontend engineers and product managers
- Participate in code reviews and technical discussions
- Write unit and integration tests for all new code

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience with Python
- Experience with relational databases (PostgreSQL preferred)
- Familiarity with REST API design
- Strong communication skills
- Experience with Docker and CI/CD pipelines is a plus
